playlist_list.empty: No playlists found. Create one with `/add_to_playlist`.
help.title: 📖 Music Bot Help
help.playback.name: 🎵 Playback
help.playback.value:
`/play <query>` — Play a song or add to queue
`/skip` — Skip the current track
`/stop` — Stop playback and clear queue
`/pause` — Pause playback
`/resume` — Resume playback
help.audio.name: 🔊 Audio
help.audio.value:
`/volume <0-100>` — Set playback volume
`/loop` — Toggle loop for current track
help.queue.name: 📋 Queue
help.queue.value:
`/queue` — Show the current queue
`/nowplaying` — Show current track info
help.voting.name: 🗳️ Voting
help.voting.value: `/vote_skip` — Vote to skip the current track
help.lyrics.name: 📜 Lyrics
help.lyrics.value: `/lyrics` — Fetch lyrics for the current song
help.playlists.name: 🎶 Playlists
help.playlists.value:
`/add_to_playlist <name> <url>` — Add a song to a playlist
`/play_playlist <name>` — Play a saved playlist
`/list_playlists` — List all playlists
help.connection.name: 🔗 Connection
help.connection.value:
`/join` — Join your voice channel
`/leave` — Leave the voice channel
help.utility.name: 🧹 Utility
help.utility.value:
`/clear [count]` — Delete recent messages
`/help` — Show this help message
`/language <lang>` — Set bot language
help.settings.name: ⚙️ Settings
help.settings.value:
`/settings view` — View all settings
`/settings audio` — Audio settings
`/settings moderation` — Moderation settings
`/settings display` — Display settings
`/settings reset` — Reset settings
cleared.title: 🧹 Messages Cleared
error.not_in_voice: You must be in a voice channel.
error.bot_not_in_voice: I am not in a voice channel.
error.not_same_channel: You must be in the same voice channel as the bot.
error.not_connected: I am not connected to a voice channel.
error.queue_empty_nothing_playing: The queue is empty and nothing is playing.
error.spotify_non_track: Spotify playlists and albums are not supported. Please provide a Spotify track link.
error.spotify_resolve_failed: No YouTube result found for Spotify track: {title} by {artist}
error.apple_music_non_track: Apple Music playlists and albums are not supported. Please share a single track link.
error.deezer_non_track: Deezer playlists, albums and artist pages are not supported. Please share a single track link.
error.tidal_non_track: Tidal playlists and albums are not supported. Please share a single track link.
error.apple_music_failed: Could not resolve Apple Music track.
error.tidal_failed: Could not resolve Tidal track. Try sharing the song name instead.
player.queue_finished: Queue finished. Disconnecting in {timeout} if idle.
player.button_not_same_channel: You must be in the same voice channel.
language.title: 🌐 Language

settings.default_volume.name: Default Volume
settings.default_volume.description: Volume level when the bot joins (1-100%)
settings.max_queue_size.name: Max Queue Size
settings.inactivity_timeout.name: Inactivity Timeout
settings.max_song_duration.name: Max Song Duration
settings.max_song_duration.description: Max song length in seconds; 0 = no limit (0-3600)
settings.max_song_duration.set: Max song duration set to **{value} seconds**.
settings.crossfade_duration.name: Crossfade Duration
settings.crossfade_duration.description: Seconds of crossfade between songs; 0 = disabled (0-10)
settings.vote_skip_threshold.name: Vote Skip Threshold
settings.vote_skip_threshold.description: Percentage of members needed to vote-skip (1-100%)
settings.dj_role.name: DJ Role
settings.dj_role.description: Role required for playback control commands
settings.restricted_text_channel.name: Text Channel
settings.restricted_text_channel.descrip: Text channel where music commands work
settings.restricted_voice_channel.name: Voice Channel
settings.restricted_voice_channel.descri: Voice channel the bot can join
settings.embed_color.name: Embed Color
settings.embed_color.description: Custom color for bot embeds (hex, e.g. #8b5cf6)
settings.progress_bar.name: Progress Bar
settings.progress_bar.description: Show live progress bar in Now Playing
settings.reset.all: All settings have been **reset to defaults**.
settings.no_changes: No options provided. Use `/settings view` to see current values.
settings.footer: Use /settings audio, /settings moderation, or /settings display to change settings.
error.no_permission: You need the **Manage Server** permission to change settings.
error.channel_not_allowed: Music commands are not allowed in this channel.
error.voice_channel_not_allowed: The bot is not allowed to join this voice channel.
error.song_too_long: Song is too long ({duration}). Maximum allowed: {max}.
